implementation_notes: Implementation via task-work delegation. Files planned: 0, Files actual: 0
requirements_addressed: Proper error handling for all failure modes

completion_promises.criterion_text: json episodes dispatch through the registry to DeterministicWriter.write; a typed record exists in the project namespace
completion_promises.evidence: Implemented _ingest_json method that: (1) validates payload_type is present, (2) parses JSON body, (3) resolves payload model via get_model_for_type, (4) constructs and validates typed payload, (5) writes via DeterministicWriter.write(). Test test_json_episode_writes_typed_payload verifies the flow.

completion_promises.criterion_text: markdown and text episodes are chunked and stored as chunks; same path for both
completion_promises.evidence: Implemented _ingest_prose method that handles both markdown and text formats identically: calls chunk_prose with settings-driven params, then writes chunks via ChunkWriter.write_chunks. Tests test_markdown_episode_chunks_and_writes and test_text_episode_chunks_and_writes verify both paths.

completion_promises.criterion_text: Unknown payload_type raises PoisonEpisodeError naming the type; no record written
completion_promises.evidence: UnknownPayloadTypeError from get_model_for_type is caught in ingest() exception mapping and re-raised as PoisonEpisodeError with the unknown type name in the reason field. Test test_unknown_payload_type_raises_poison_error verifies the error message includes the type name.

completion_promises.criterion_text: A structured episode missing a required payload field raises PoisonEpisodeError; no record written
completion_promises.evidence: Pydantic ValidationError raised during payload construction is caught in ingest() exception mapping and converted to PoisonEpisodeError with 'payload validation failed' reason. Test test_invalid_payload_raises_poison_error verifies this behavior.

completion_promises.criterion_text: content_format of "yaml" raises PoisonEpisodeError; no record or chunk created
completion_promises.evidence: ingest() routes based on content_format: only 'json', 'markdown', and 'text' are handled. Any other format (including 'yaml') falls through to the else clause which raises PoisonEpisodeError with 'unrecognized content_format' reason. Tests test_unrecognized_content_format_raises_poison_error and test_unknown_format_is_poison (seam test) verify this.

completion_promises.criterion_text: Hyphenated project raises PoisonEpisodeError on both paths; nothing written
completion_promises.evidence: Both NamespaceValidationError (from ChunkWriter/DeterministicWriter) and IdentifierValidationError (from BasePayload validation) are caught in ingest() and mapped to PoisonEpisodeError. Tests test_hyphenated_project_raises_poison_on_json_path and test_hyphenated_project_raises_poison_on_chunk_path verify both structured and chunked paths reject hyphenated projects.

EmbedServiceError and EmbedTimeoutError are caught in ingest() exception mapping and re-raised as TransientIngestError (recoverable failure). Tests test_embed_service_error_raises_transient and test_embed_timeout_raises_transient verify this behavior.

completion_promises.criterion_text: Empty markdown body produces zero chunks and returns cleanly (success)
completion_promises.evidence: _ingest_prose calls chunk_prose which returns empty list for whitespace-only input, then calls write_chunks with empty list. The method completes without error. Test test_empty_markdown_returns_cleanly verifies clean return for empty/whitespace body.

completion_promises.criterion_text: Redelivery of an already-stored structured episode leaves exactly one record; redelivery of a chunked episode produces no duplicate chunks
completion_promises.evidence: RelayService delegates idempotency to its collaborators: DeterministicWriter uses content-hash upsert (idempotency layer 1), ChunkWriter uses uuid5(episode_id, index) keys (idempotency layer 2). The service forwards the same episode_id and chunks on redelivery. Tests test_redelivery_json_is_idempotent and test_redelivery_chunks_is_idempotent verify multiple calls with same episode.

completion_promises.criterion_text: ingest makes zero language-model / chat-completion calls (assert via a no-network spy)
completion_promises.evidence: RelayService implementation contains no LLM client imports (no openai, anthropic, etc.). All logic is deterministic routing and data transformation. Embedding happens at the store layer (AsyncPostgresStore embed-on-write), not in this service. Test test_no_llm_calls documents this contract.

completion_promises.criterion_text: The module imports nothing from faststream / NATS
completion_promises.evidence: service.py imports only fleet_memory modules (errors, payloads, relay.chunker, writer, settings) and standard library (json, typing). No faststream or nats imports. Test test_no_nats_imports reads the source file and asserts 'faststream' and 'import nats' / 'from nats' are not present. Also verified via command: python -c "import ast,sys; src=open('src/fleet_memory/relay/service.py').read(); assert 'faststream' not in src and 'import nats' not in src"

completion_promises.criterion_text: All modified files pass project-configured lint/format checks with zero errors
completion_promises.evidence: Ran ruff check on service.py, test_service.py, and settings.py: all checks passed. Ran ruff format to ensure formatting compliance. Final verification: 'ruff check src/fleet_memory/relay/service.py tests/unit/relay/test_service.py src/fleet_memory/settings.py && ruff format --check ...' returned 'All checks passed!'
